gaps_identified: Taylor's mother's legal battle to clear his name
The political pressure that changed the Navy's official verdict
The human cost vs the myth-making
chosen_angle: How a mother's grief rewrote military history — the fight to change Flight 19's verdict from pilot error to 'causes unknown'
angle_justification: Every video focuses on the mystery. Nobody tells the story of how the official record was literally rewritten because one woman refused to accept blame.
twist_potential: The real mystery isn't what happened to the planes — it's why the Navy changed their own conclusion
hook_moment: The moment the Navy Board crossed out 'pilot error' and wrote 'reasons unknown'
